## How to test

- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src/cli/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `dotnet test src/api/Whodat.slnx`
- [ ] `docker compose up -d --build` (if API or compose changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] I bumped `version` in [src/cli/Cargo.toml](src/cli/Cargo.toml) (required for releases)
- [ ] I ran the test suite locally (or explained why not)
- [ ] I kept changes focused and easy to review
- [ ] I updated the README where needed
- [ ] I verified no secrets/keys are committed
